title: Memorandum of Agreement or Understanding — Copies
source_text: e. Copies. The activity signing last should send copies of the agreement to all cosigners.
plain_language_rule: The activity signing last should send copies of the agreement to all cosigners.
renderer_impact: This rule selects MOA/MOU copy distribution handling for cosigners. The activity signing last is responsible for sending copies to all cosigners. No layout rendering is implied unless copy-distribution output is later implemented.
notes: Source text resolved from manual section 10-2.6e Copies. This rule governs MOA/MOU copy distribution. The activity signing last sends copies of the agreement to all cosigners.
